messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-504 — TS metrics extractTicketId uses an unbounded [A-Za-z]+ prefix and requires a hyphen: it drops no-hyphen task names (blNNN) and over-matches non-tickets (usable-493, ABL-217), silently corrupting stage-dwell / holding-window / rework metrics
What it solves: ROOT CAUSE (grep- and node-confirmed 2026-07-17):
  - extension/src/metrics/swarmMetrics.ts:351 — the SHARED exported extractTicketId is
    `task.match(/^([A-Za-z]+-\d+)/)` returning match[1] verbatim. Two defects:
      (a) HYPHEN REQUIRED: "bl493-fold-ticket-events" -> null (no hyphen between "b…
Approval context: Lower-severity TS sibling of BL-503, same root cause surfaced by the coordinator today. The shared swarmMetrics.ts extractTicketId both (a) drops no-hyphen task names (blNNN -> null, so those tickets vanish from stage-dwell / holding-window / rework metrics) and, worse, (b) uses an UNBOUNDED [A-Za-…
BL-504 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-504" (or "reject BL-504 <reason>") to act.
